ddls:
CREATE TABLE "flours" (
  "flour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flour type */,
  "flour_name" TEXT /* Name of the flour type */,
  "ash_content" TEXT /* Ash content percentage of the flour */,
  "protein_content" TEXT /* Protein content percentage of the flour */,
  "us_description" TEXT /* Description of the flour in US terminology */,
  "flour_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the flour */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the flour */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the flour is sourced from */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Any certifications the flour has */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the flour type was added to the database */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the flour type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flours_flour_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("flour_category_id") REFERENCES flour_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flours_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES supplier_information ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flour_nutrition" (
  "nutrition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrition entry */,
  "flour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flour type being described */,
  "german_value" INTEGER /* Value for the flour in German units */,
  "french_value" INTEGER /* Value for the flour in French units */,
  "italian_value" INTEGER /* Value for the flour in Italian units */,
  "netherlands_value" TEXT /* Value for the flour in Dutch units */,
  "fiber_content" TEXT /* Fiber content percentage of the flour */,
  "fat_content" TEXT /* Fat content percentage of the flour */,
  "carbohydrate_content" TEXT /* Carbohydrate content percentage of the flour */,
  "calories" TEXT /* Caloric content per 100g of flour */,
  "vitamin_content" TEXT /* Vitamin content */,
  "mineral_content" TEXT /* Mineral content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nutrition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flour_nutrition_flour_id FOREIGN KEY ("flour_id") REFERENCES flours ("flour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flour_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the flour category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supplier_information" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the supplier */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier operates */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the supplier */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the supplier */,
  "supplier_type" TEXT /* Type of supplier */,
  "certification" TEXT /* Any certifications the supplier has */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the supplier was added to the database */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the supplier information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flour_usage_records" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "flour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flour type used */,
  "quantity_used" REAL /* Quantity of flour used in production (in kg) */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date when the flour was used */,
  "produced_item" TEXT /* Item produced using the flour */,
  "batch_id" TEXT /* Batch identifier for the flour used */,
  "production_line" TEXT /* Production line where the flour was used */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator who recorded the usage */,
  "quality_check_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality check during production */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes related to the usage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flour_usage_records_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flour_usage_records_flour_id FOREIGN KEY ("flour_id") REFERENCES flours ("flour_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was added to the system */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flour_quality_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality test */,
  "flour_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flour type tested */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the quality test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes related to the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of quality test */,
  "test_method" TEXT /* Method used for the quality test */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the operator who conducted the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was conducted */,
  "test_temperature" TEXT /* Temperature conditions during the test */,
  "test_humidity" TEXT /* Humidity conditions during the test */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was recorded */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the test information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flour_quality_tests_flour_id FOREIGN KEY ("flour_id") REFERENCES flours ("flour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flour_quality_tests_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
